name: My Honey Glazed Carrots & Parsnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the parsnips and carrots. Cut them into half lengthwise, then slice diagonally into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. In a large skillet, combine the carrots, butter, chicken stock, and a pinch of salt. Bring to boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, covered for 4 minutes.
4. Add the parsnips; cook an additional 4-6 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. With a slotted spoon, transfer the veggies to a shallow baking dish. Reserve the liquid in the pan.
6. Sprinkle the veggies with salt and pepper.
7. If necessary, add more stock to the pan to make 1/4 cup. Stir in honey, lemon juice, and curry powder.
8. Bring to boil over high heat and boil for 1 minute or until the liquid has thickened slightly.
9. Pour the sauce over the veggies.
10. (The recipe can be prepared ahead up to this point and refrigerated, covered, up to 1 day. Reheat vegetables, uncovered, in a 400-degree oven for 15-20 minutes or until slightly glazed. Stir once during cooking.)
Note: The curry is optional. This recipe should work well with the timing of the turkey. Simply place it in the oven as the turkey is removed from the BBQ.
